exports.name: savePushSubscription
exports.signature: (gameId: string, subscription: PushSubscriptionRecord) -> Promise<void>; writes the current player's subscription record onto their participant entry in the game document

exports.name: readOpponentPushSubscription
exports.signature: (gameId: string) -> Promise<PushSubscriptionRecord | null>; returns the opponent's subscription record if present, else null

exports.name: getCurrentUid
exports.signature: () -> string; returns the current anonymous auth UID

invariants: Section-3 never imports the Firebase SDK directly; all backend reads/writes for push concerns route through section-2's adapter.
Push delivery on submit is a side-effect triggered by section-4 calling section-3's sendTurnNotification, which then reads the opponent's subscription via this adapter.
